series_metadata.series_title: Remittance of Reparations Rotary, Court Payments & IOLTA payments.
series_metadata.series_description: Courts and health districts collect certain fees required by statute and banks collect the interest earned on lawyers'' trust accounts (IOLTA). These funds are remitted to the Treasurer on a periodic basis. This record series includes the forms submitted by the relevant court or health district, as well as supporting documentation showing the deposit and allocation of such funds to the proper fund within OAKS. For IOLTA payments, there is supporting documentation to show the deposit of funds into the proper bank account, and the subsequent transfer of such funds to the main state bank account, and the posting of the remittance to the proper OAKS fund.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: conclusion of current fiscal year, and an additional 1 fiscal years. ; Electronic: conclusion of current fiscal year, and an additional 1 fiscal years
